allow: Bash(node -e "try { require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''web/js/api.js'', ''utf8''\); console.log\(''api.js: OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''api.js:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "try { require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''web/js/pages/playground.js'', ''utf8''\); console.log\(''playground.js: OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''playground.js:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "try { require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''web/js/pages/project-settings.js'', ''utf8''\); console.log\(''project-settings.js: OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''project-settings.js:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\(''fs''\).then\(fs => { const code = fs.readFileSync\(''web/js/api.js'', ''utf8''\); new Function\(code\); console.log\(''api.js: parses OK''\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\(''api.js:'', e.message\)\)")
